message:
fix(core/cli): enable dynamic prompts for bundle generation

Updates generateBundleSkillMd() and getBundlePrompts() to accept an
optional promptsMap parameter, enabling bundle generation with dynamically
loaded prompts instead of static imports.

- bundles.ts: Add optional promptsMap param to getBundlePrompts and
  generateBundleSkillMd for dependency injection
- install.ts: Remove duplicated generateDynamicBundleSkillMd helper,
  use core's generateBundleSkillMd with dynamic prompts map

This fixes bundle installation when using the dynamic registry loader
and removes ~70 lines of duplicated code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
